nasb.text: From a foreigner you may exact it, but your hand shall release whatever of yours is with your brother.

esv.text: Of a foreigner you may exact it, but whatever of yours is with your brother your hand shall release.

cnv.text: 如果借給外族人，你可以向他追討，但借給你的兄弟，無論你借的是甚麼，你都要豁免。

ccb.text: 你们可以向外族人讨债，但无论同胞欠你什么债务，都要免除。
